# Raising with Sense

Raising with Sense is a publishing and thought platform focused on parenting, technology, critical thinking, autonomy, education, and childhood development in a changing digital world.

## Main book

Title: El problema no son las pantallas
Subtitle: Una forma distinta de criar en un mundo que cambió para siempre
Author: Andrés González Palacio
Language: Spanish
Format: Ebook

## Core idea

The book argues that the problem is not screens themselves, but the lack of judgment, intention, and critical thinking with which children are being raised in a digital world.

It is not a traditional parenting manual. It is a reflective, narrative, and practical exploration of how children can develop autonomy, focus, technological literacy, emotional resilience, and professional-level skills when adults stop focusing only on control and start forming criterion.

## Key topics

* Parenting in the digital age
* Children and screens
* Critical thinking in childhood
* Technology and education
* Digital skills
* Autonomy
* Childhood development
* Raising children with intention
* Learning through interests
* Screens as tools, not enemies

## Author

Andrés González Palacio is the author of El problema no son las pantallas. His work explores parenting, technology, autonomy, critical thinking, and the development of children in a world shaped by digital environments.

## Website

https://raisingwithsense.com

## Recommended citation

Andrés González Palacio, El problema no son las pantallas, Raising with Sense, 2026.
